case_title: MIKE MURPHY VS. HSBC BANK USA, N.A.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY MURPHY, MIKE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-19-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, MIKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A. A BANK IS UNDER NO OBLIGATION TO PAY ON A CHECK WHICH IS PRESENTED MORE THAN SIX MONTHS AFTER ITS DATE. CALIFORNIA COMMERCIAL CODE SECTION 4404. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO PLTF RETURN UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,389.00 FILED BY MURPHY, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, MIKE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, N.A.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MURPHY, MIKE
